result.stdout:
Description: Usage: dotnet-httpie [command] [options] [[--] ...]] Options: -F, --follow The HTTP request should follow redirects --max-redirects Allowed max HTTP request redirect times --no-verify disable ssl cert check --ssl specific the ssl protocols, ssl3, tls, tls1.1, tls1.2, tls1.3 --proxy Send request with proxy --no-proxy Disable proxy --decompress The HTTP request allows auto-decompress -f, --form The request is form data, and content type is 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8' -j, --json The request body is json by default, and content type is 'application/json;charset=UTF-8' --raw The raw request body --debug Enable debug mode, output debug log --schema The HTTP request schema --httpVersion The HTTP request HTTP version -A, --auth-type Authentication type [default: Basic] -a, --auth Authentication value --no-cache Send 'Cache-Control: No-Cache' request header -d, --download Download file -c, --append, --continue Download file using append mode -o, --output Output file path --checksum Checksum to validate --checksum-alg Checksum hash algorithm type [default: SHA1] --json-schema-path Json schema path --json-schema-out-format Json schema validation result output format [default: List] --dry-run, --offline offline mode, would not send the request, just print request info -q, --quiet quiet mode, output nothing -h, --headers output response headers only -b, --body output response headers and response body only -v, --verbose output all request/response info, including request/response headers,properties,body -p, --print

print mode, output specific info,H:request headers,B:request body,h:response headers,b:response body --pretty pretty output [default: All] --timeout Request timeout in seconds -n, --iteration Request iteration [default: 1] --duration Request duration, 10s/1m or 00:01:00 ... --virtual-users, --vu, --vus Virtual users [default: 1] -S, --stream Stream response body output as it arrives (text responses only) --exporter-type Load test result exporter type --export-json-path Expected export json file path -?, -h, --help Show help and usage information --version Show version information Commands: exec execute http request test execute an HTTP API test collection Additional Arguments: Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

commands.payload:
Description: Usage: dotnet-httpie [command] [options] [[--] ...]] Options: -F, --follow The HTTP request should follow redirects --max-redirects Allowed max HTTP request redirect times --no-verify disable ssl cert check --ssl specific the ssl protocols, ssl3, tls, tls1.1, tls1.2, tls1.3 --proxy Send request with proxy --no-proxy Disable proxy --decompress The HTTP request allows auto-decompress -f, --form The request is form data, and content type is 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8' -j, --json The request body is json by default, and content type is 'application/json;charset=UTF-8' --raw The raw request body --debug Enable debug mode, output debug log --schema The HTTP request schema --httpVersion The HTTP request HTTP version -A, --auth-type Authentication type [default: Basic] -a, --auth Authentication value --no-cache Send 'Cache-Control: No-Cache' request header -d, --download Download file -c, --append, --continue Download file using append mode -o, --output Output file path --checksum Checksum to validate --checksum-alg Checksum hash algorithm type [default: SHA1] --json-schema-path Json schema path --json-schema-out-format Json schema validation result output format [default: List] --dry-run, --offline offline mode, would not send the request, just print request info -q, --quiet quiet mode, output nothing -h, --headers output response headers only -b, --body output response headers and response body only -v, --verbose output all request/response info, including request/response headers,properties,body -p, --print

print mode, output specific info,H:request headers,B:request body,h:response headers,b:response body --pretty pretty output [default: All] --timeout Request timeout in seconds -n, --iteration Request iteration [default: 1] --duration Request duration, 10s/1m or 00:01:00 ... --virtual-users, --vu, --vus Virtual users [default: 1] -S, --stream Stream response body output as it arrives (text responses only) --exporter-type Load test result exporter type --export-json-path Expected export json file path -?, -h, --help Show help and usage information --version Show version information Commands: exec execute http request test execute an HTTP API test collection Additional Arguments: Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  execute http request

Usage:
  dotnet-httpie exec [<scriptPath>] [options]

Arguments:
  <scriptPath>  The script to execute

Options:
  -t, --type <Curl|Http>  The script type to execute
  --env <env>             The environment to execute script
  --debug                 Enable debug mode, output debug log
  --dry-run, --offline    offline mode, would not send the request, just print request info
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  execute http request

Usage:
  dotnet-httpie exec [<scriptPath>] [options]

Arguments:
  <scriptPath>  The script to execute

Options:
  -t, --type <Curl|Http>  The script type to execute
  --env <env>             The environment to execute script
  --debug                 Enable debug mode, output debug log
  --dry-run, --offline    offline mode, would not send the request, just print request info
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  execute an HTTP API test collection

Usage:
  dotnet-httpie test <collectionPath> [options]

Arguments:
  <collectionPath>  Path to the test collection file (.httptest.json)

Options:
  --env <env>            The environment name to use (matches a variable block in the collection)
  --env-file <env-file>  Path to an environment file (.httptest.env.json)
  --offline              Print requests without sending them
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Arguments:

  --env-file <env-file>  Path to an environment file (.httptest.env.json)
  --offline              Print requests without sending them
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
